betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Thorium Fuel§f

§aThe self-breeding fuel cycle — cheaper than uranium with a unique breeding advantage!§f

§bThorium Fuel§f is a 2:1 mixture of thorium-232 (fertile) and uranium-233 (fissile). It is one of the weakest fuels, but also one of the cheapest. Its key mechanic: breeding §emore fissile material§f than it consumes.

§6Production§f:
• §bBreeding Reactor§f — Th-232 quad rod at §e1,500§f flux → Thorium Fuel quad rod
• §bManual§f — 2 U-233 nuggets + 4 Th-232 nuggets → Th Fuel billet (shapeless)

§6ZIRNOX Thorium Fuel§f (40 heat/t, 200,000 ticks):
• Sits between NU and MEU in power
• Recycling: §e2 U-238, 2 Th-232, 4 U-233, 4 nuclear waste§f
• Produces more U-233 than consumed — truly sustainable!

§6Thorium Breeding Rods (ZIRNOX)§f:
• Neutron activation of Th-232 → U-233
• Provides no flux/heat until breeding completes
• Short lifespan: §e20,000 ticks§f
• Shapeless: Empty ZIRNOX Rod + Th-232 Billet

§eSee RBMK Thorium Fuel quest for ThMEU fuel stats, RBMK usage, and recycling details!
